name: registry-broker-codex-plugin
description: Codex plugin and MCP server for discovering, ranking, and summoning Registry Broker specialists.

interface.shortDescription: Summon broker specialists without leaving Codex
interface.longDescription: Find the best Registry Broker specialist for a bounded subtask, delegate through the broker with ranking and fallback logic, and pull the session back into Codex when you need the exact conversation trail.
defaultPrompt: Summon the best broker specialist for this bug and return a fix plan.
Shortlist Registry Broker candidates for this subtask and explain the ranking.
Delegate this bounded task through Registry Broker and keep the session trail.
